# SaaS Maker

> Drop-in backend services for SaaS apps — ship faster without building common infrastructure from scratch.

SaaS Maker provides plug-and-play backend tools for every stage of your SaaS product. No need to build feedback systems, waitlists, testimonials, or changelogs from scratch.

## Services

- Feedback & Feature Requests: Collect user feedback with voting and status tracking
- Roadmap: Public Kanban board with upvoting and feedback promotion
- Waitlist: Pre-launch email collection
- Testimonials: Collect and display customer testimonials
- Changelog: Versioned product updates
- Knowledge Base: Vector-based RAG search for docs
- AI Gateway: Proxied LLM requests with usage tracking
- Directory: Public product showcase

## Links

- Website: https://sassmaker.com
- Dashboard: https://app.sassmaker.com
- Documentation: https://docs.sassmaker.com
- Full API & SDK docs for LLMs: https://docs.sassmaker.com/llms.txt
- GitHub: https://github.com/sarthakagrawal927/saas-maker
- npm SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@saas-maker/sdk

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @saas-maker/sdk
```

```typescript
import { SaaSMakerClient } from '@saas-maker/sdk';

const client = new SaaSMakerClient({ apiKey: 'pk_your_api_key' });

// Collect feedback
await client.feedback.submit({ title: 'Add dark mode', type: 'feature_request' });

// Chatbot with knowledge base
const convo = client.chatbot.createConversation();
const reply = await client.chatbot.send(convo, 'How do I publish a changelog?', {
  indexId: 'idx_docs',
});
```
